top3.sql:
SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1
AND 'OWNER' NOT IN (
    SELECT d2.type 
    FROM disp d2 
    WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id
);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp d2
    WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id
    AND d2.type != 'OWNER'
);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1
AND 'OWNER' NOT IN (
    SELECT d2.type 
    FROM disp d2 
    WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id
);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp d2
    WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id
    AND d2.type != 'OWNER'
);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp d
    WHERE d.client_id = c.client_id
    AND d.type = 'OWNER'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp d2
    WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id
    AND d2.type != 'OWNER'
);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1
AND 'OWNER' NOT IN (
    SELECT d2.type 
    FROM disp d2 
    WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id
);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
WHERE c.client_id IN (
    SELECT d.client_id
    FROM disp d
    WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
    GROUP BY d.client_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM disp d2
        WHERE d2.client_id = d.client_id
    )
);

SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp d2
    WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id
    AND d2.type != 'OWNER'
);

final.sql:
SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.district_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.type) = 1
AND 'OWNER' NOT IN (
    SELECT d2.type 
    FROM disp d2 
    WHERE d2.client_id = c.client_id
);
